text.title: embeddings-provider-apis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embeddings-provider-apis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cache query embeddings keyed only by text when the model changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Include model identifier in the cache key: f"{model}:{text}". A model change invalidates all cached embeddings silently otherwise.

failure-mode.description: Embedding HTML or markdown with tags intact.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip formatting before embedding or the model wastes token budget on structure tokens (div, span, **, ##) instead of semantic content, reducing embedding quality.

failure-mode.description: Forgetting input_type="query" for search queries when using Voyage or Cohere, defaulting to "document".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Using document embedding for queries drops retrieval quality 3-8% because query and document representations are optimized for different linguistic patterns in asymmetric models.
